feat.name: Gods' Palm
feat.text: You control your spirit energy when you attack, using it to reinforce yourself or to thrust past your enemy’s physical defenses. Make a fist Strike; on a success, you can choose to either deal all damage from the attack as spirit damage, or deal damage as normal but gain a number of temporary Hit Points equal to half your level that last for 1 round.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

traits.name: Flourish
traits.text: Actions with the flourish trait are special techniques that require too much exertion for you to perform frequently. You can use only one action with the flourish trait per round.
